description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named windows that runs on push to master and tags, pull requests, and workflow dispatch. The workflow has two jobs: build and packaging. The build job uses a matrix strategy to build on multiple architectures and operating systems, checking out the repository, setting up the environment, restoring timestamps, caching the build, downloading dependencies, installing MinGW, and configuring and building the project. The packaging job depends on the build job, downloads the build artifacts, generates .pdb files, downloads stk-assets, and packages the project for release.
